name: feature.brand.nodes
description: Brand & Guardrails feature node pack (ADR 0155 / ADR 0014 / ADR 0170) — read + enforce nodes over the ctx.features.brand surface shipped by the Brand feature package. Lets a workflow (or a chat agent via the agent pack) read the app's white-label identity, resolve a brand's voice into a prompt block, and score generated content for compliance (deterministic banned-phrase / formality / per-channel length blended with an LLM tone judgement).
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Brand: List Brands
nodes.description: Lists the workspace's brands (optionally one org) over ctx.features.brand. Tenant-guarded. Inputs: { orgId? }. Output: { brands }.

nodes.label: Brand: Get App Identity
nodes.description: Reads the installation's white-label app identity (ADR 0170) — logo, colors, typography, name, theme — over ctx.features.brand. Host-global (the reserved app brand). No inputs. Output: { identity }.

nodes.label: Brand: Resolve Voice
nodes.description: Renders a brand's voice (formality, channel rules, approved + banned phrases) into a prompt-injectable text block downstream generators prepend. Inputs: { brandId, channel?, register? }. Output: { voice }.

nodes.label: Brand: Compliance Check
nodes.description: Scores content against a brand's guardrails — the pure deterministic leg (banned-phrase caps ≤30, formality register, per-channel length) blended 60/40 with an LLM tone judgement when ctx.callAI is available. Inputs: { brandId, content, channel?, provider?, model? }. Output: { report }.
